body_txt: This is a numerical claim that mysteriously shifts over the course of a conversation. Note that there are two different ways this can vary — the number can either increase or decrease, and it can either converge on the correct number (in which case this is a form of Verbal Backspace ) or start near-correct and end up somewhere wild. A sure sign of a Bad Liar . Not to be confused with Victor Borge's "Inflationary Language" routine. Compare Escalating Punchline .
